writing.title: Writing Task 2: A discussion essay
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 50 words) discussing both sides of an issue, using furthermore/moreover/nevertheless/in contrast/as a result.
writing.sampleAnswer: Some people support online learning because it saves time. Moreover, it is flexible. Nevertheless, many students argue that they learn better in person. As a result, schools usually offer both options nowadays.
checklist: Dùng ít nhất 2 từ nối học thuật khác nhau
Trình bày được cả hai mặt của vấn đề
Đoạn văn mạch lạc, có kết luận

writing.title: Writing Task 2: Education, work, and technology
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 50 words) about how technology affects education and work, combining grammar from earlier chapters (Present Perfect, Conditional, relative clauses, used to).
writing.sampleAnswer: Technology has changed education a lot in recent years. If schools had more computers, students would learn faster. I used to write everything by hand, but things have changed. Many jobs will require digital skills in the future.
checklist: Kết hợp được ít nhất 3 cấu trúc đã học trước đó
Chủ đề bám sát giáo dục/công nghệ/công việc
Đoạn văn có mở-thân-kết đơn giản
